Third-Party License Notice
==========================

This project uses, builds against, or interoperates with the following third-party
software projects. These notices apply only to the identified third-party
software and do not change the license terms for More Swords Mod itself.

The complete text for each listed software license can be found in the directory
"thirdparty/licenses".

* Fabric API libraries
  * Copyright (c) 2016 FabricMC
  * License: Apache License 2.0 (SPDX: Apache-2.0)
  * Original Source:
    * https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric
